TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Maifor ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 108 buwan, 245 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 180 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 65 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 39%, Bunun 3%, Tayan 4%, Paywan 1%, Sakizaya 25%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Maifor hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Maifor hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Maifor hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maifor hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maifor hya' ga Koyo. tay mkyahu' na Maifor hya' ga Sapat. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Maifor ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mai*or ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, s~ɕakizaja **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa kojo. taj mkjaħuʔ na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕapat. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ mai*or ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Maifor ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 108 buwan, 245 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 180 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 65 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 39%, Bunun 3%, Tayan 4%, Paywan 1%, Sakizaya 25%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Maifor hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Maifor hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Maifor hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maifor hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maifor hya' ga Koyo. tay mkyahu' na Maifor hya' ga Sapat. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Maifor ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mai*or ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, s~ɕakizaja **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa kojo. taj mkjaħuʔ na mai*or ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕapat. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ mai*or ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
